title: Crumbly Moroccan Mature Cheddar Crumble
description: A rich and crumbly Moroccan dish featuring mature cheddar cheese, caramelized to perfection with no added sugars.

ingredients.name: Fresh Herbs (Optional)
ingredients.notes: Such as fresh parsley or cilantro for garnish

instructions: Gently mix the mature cheddar cheese with heavy cream and a pinch of salt.
Pour the mixture into an oven-safe dish. Bake in preheated oven for about 20 minutes, or until it starts to brown on top.
Remove from heat and let cool slightly. Garnish with fresh herbs if desired.
